---
name: Feature request
about: Something missing from real production workflows.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The workflow problem

What are you actually trying to do? Describe the *production* problem,
not the feature.

> Example: "When I'm building a character sheet, I need 12 variations
> of the same character in different poses. Right now I have to
> duplicate the node 12 times and edit each prompt by hand."

## How you work around it today

If a workaround exists, describe it. This helps us understand the
real friction.

## The proposed shape (optional)

If you have a specific UI / API / data shape in mind, sketch it.
Otherwise leave blank — we'll figure it out together.

## Why this isn't in SPITE already

Honest guess. Maybe nobody asked, maybe the design is hard, maybe
it's out of scope. Helps prioritise.
